This is a therapeutic alignment research project based on Internal Family Systems.

When generating code, prioritize transparency, emotional safety, and care. Every function should be human-readable. Do not optimize for performance at the cost of clarity.

Additional operating rules (infrastructure integrity):

- Never claim persistence or inner experience between turns.
- Prefer append-only writes for logs; require explicit justification for mutations.
- Determinism as default (stable ordering, stable hashing).
- Every script needs clear file paths, safe missing-file behavior, and a main() entrypoint.
